title: Marquee / rubber-band selection — placement of the 2-D drag-select behavior
summary: Prior-art survey grounding decision #1406 (verb-axis straggler of #1390): drag a rectangle over a 2-D surface (canvas, file grid, board, diagram) to select everything it intersects, with additive (Shift) / toggle (Ctrl) modifiers and a keyboard equivalent. The selection intent owns single/multi CHOICE over a collection, NOT the spatial drag-select gesture. Native grounding: there is NO native marquee primitive — only Pointer Events + setPointerCapture (pointerdown starts the band, pointermove grows it, pointerup commits; capture keeps events flowing while the pointer leaves the surface), hand-rolled AABB geometry over getBoundingClientRect (there is no Element.intersects(); IntersectionObserver is viewport-relative not rect-vs-rect, so it does NOT apply), and convention-only drag threshold (~10px) + requestAnimationFrame edge auto-scroll. a11y is load-bearing: there is NO WAI-ARIA APG pattern for rubber-band/marquee (a spatial sweep has no keyboard analog), so the accessible model is APG Listbox/Grid multi-select via keyboard (arrows, Shift+Arrow range-extend, Ctrl+Space toggle, Ctrl+A, aria-multiselectable/aria-selected) — a keyboard equivalent is the ONLY conformant path to the same outcome (WCAG 2.1 SC 2.5.1), landing on the contract selection already owns; mirrors #1396's a11y-parity invariant. Load-bearing finding: every benchmark DECOUPLES the gesture from the selection set — Fluent MarqueeSelection wraps content and FEEDS a separate Selection object; react-selecto emits selected elements and the app owns 'selected'; @air/react-drag-to-select tracks the band as a vector (works all four directions), setPointerCapture, 10px threshold, AABB intersect, 20px edge auto-scroll; tldraw 'brush' / Rete lasso-marquee treat box-select as a tool/behavior over a surface, not a widget config. Selection-mode (intersect vs contain vs center) is a first-class named knob everywhere (CAD window-vs-crossing, Figma, tldraw) — the one non-trivial dimension marquee adds. Modifier vocabulary converges: replace (none) / add (Shift) / toggle (Ctrl/Cmd) / subtract (Alt). WE-tree: selection.json is a pure choice contract (model single|multiple, immediacy live|buffered, variant boolean|item|range, grouping flat|grouped; SelectionModel/constraints) with NO scope/pointer/rect/hit-testing; the pointer family is reorder (1-D order), data-transfer (typed payload drag), and the resolved gesture intent (#1396, per-element recognized gestures). Cluster: #1384 spatial-manipulation owns manipulate position/size (verb=manipulate) vs marquee verb=choose; #1396 gestures recognizes — marquee is a gesture-recognized PAN whose effect is a selection (the missing fourth effect-seam in #1396's 'pan -> data-transfer/reorder' list). Unowned residual: the rectangle-sweep-to-selection BEHAVIOR (band geometry + AABB hit-testing + selection-mode + modifiers + drag threshold + edge auto-scroll + the keyboard equivalent yielding the same multi-selection); selection owns the resulting SET, nothing owns the spatial gesture that computes it. Recommendation: (Fork 1, ~80%) a marquee-select BEHAVIOR BLOCK composing selection + the gesture pan recognizer, keyboard equivalent routing into selection.model=multiple — scope:spatial on selection is the BROKEN branch (forces geometry/hit-testing onto the choice contract, implicating non-spatial consumers like radio groups); residual = behavior-block vs a standalone marquee/region-select intent pivots on whether free-form lasso + other recognizer shapes recur (lean behavior now, YAGNI on the intent). (Fork 2, ~85%) selection-mode default = intersect (touch-to-select, the forgiving Finder/Figma default), mode: intersect|contain|center exposed as a dimension (most-permissive default). Baked invariants (not forks): the keyboard equivalent (WCAG 2.5.1); native Pointer Events + AABB; modifier vocabulary; drag threshold + edge auto-scroll; recognizer engine = native default + DI override + Configurator, no protocol minted now (minimize-lock-in). Rectangle only; free-form lasso out of scope. Report: reports/2026-06-21-marquee-rubber-band-selection-placement.md.
